name: coderkeys
description: Open-source, local-first typing tutor for programmers and technical writers

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @coderkeys/schemas build && pnpm --filter @coderkeys/engine build && pnpm --filter @coderkeys/web dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @coderkeys/schemas build && pnpm --filter @coderkeys/engine build && pnpm -r typecheck
